positive: A vibrant, retro-futuristic geometric portrait of a whimsical forest creature, perhaps a mystical owl or a stylized fox. The creature should be rendered in a bold, stylized silhouette against a pop-art, geometric background composed of repeating abstract shapes, gradients, and dotted patterns. Use a highly saturated, limited color palette (e.g., cyan, magenta, and deep orange) reminiscent of 1980s Memphis design. Focus on strong, clean lines and high contrast suitable for direct apparel printing. Minimalist composition, perfect for a central chest graphic. Vectors art style, flat graphic design, clean edges.
negative: blurry, low detail, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, gradient fade, realistic, photographic, muted, messy
